case_title: Process formally closed without substantive resolution
decision_trigger: The institution treated the process as complete, but the underlying issue remained unresolved.
recall_question: What happens when a process is formally completed without resolving the issue it was meant to address?
desired_outcome: Substantive resolution, procedural clarity, and an accurate record of closure without remedy
rules_or_procedures: Closure notice or final response process
External review route after internal closure
constraints: Process has been treated as complete
Need to distinguish closure from resolution

actors.name: Citizen complainant
actors.incentive_or_pressure: seeking substantive resolution and an accurate record
actors.likely_behaviour: preserve the record, distinguish procedural completion from substantive outcome, and assess escalation

actors.name: Institutional decision-maker
actors.incentive_or_pressure: bring the matter to formal closure and limit continued exposure
actors.likely_behaviour: frame the process as completed even where substantive resolution is absent

evidence_bundle.label: Closure or final response notice
evidence_bundle.relevance: Shows that the institution considers the process complete

evidence_bundle.label: Outstanding unresolved issue record
evidence_bundle.relevance: Shows that the underlying issue remains unresolved despite closure

deadlines.label: Post-closure review deadline
deadlines.consequence: Missing this deadline may narrow external review options

timeline.label: Complaint submitted
timeline.description: The original complaint was submitted to the institution

timeline.label: Closure communicated
timeline.description: The institution communicated that the process was complete or closed

timeline.label: Issue remains unresolved
timeline.description: The underlying issue remained unresolved despite formal closure

escalation_paths.name: Post-closure external review
escalation_paths.trigger: Process is closed but substantive resolution has not been achieved
escalation_paths.likely_response: Review of whether procedure was followed and whether closure was substantively sufficient

linked_cases.note: Earlier matter where process closure and substantive outcome diverged

structural_insight: The process may be formally completed while the underlying issue remains unresolved.
personal_positioning: Distinguishing procedural closure from substantive resolution.
decision_note: Record the closure accurately, preserve the unresolved outcome, and assess whether external review is appropriate.
learning_capture: Formal closure does not necessarily indicate substantive resolution.
